title: Wild San Diego
description: <p>They call it the perfect city. With surf, sand, and superb weather, millions of visitors flock to San Diego every year. This oasis at the crossroads of desert and sea is a natural marvel and boasts the highest diversity of plants and animals of any other county in the contiguous U.S. For millennia, the relentless <a href="https://balboapark.org/event/wild-san-diego/" class="more-link">...</a></p>\n
